narrative:
Perry 20 (precinct in Stark County) has 682 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
